userStories.title: Initialize the Vite and TypeScript workspace
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a clean Vite and TypeScript workspace so that I can run and build the project locally.
acceptanceCriteria: `npm run dev` starts the local server
`npm run build` creates a production build
The default page loads in a browser

userStories.title: Add linting, typecheck, and unit test scripts
userStories.description: As a developer, I want baseline quality scripts so that later tickets have a clear definition of done.
userStories.notes: Required by most later engineering tickets.

userStories.title: Create full-screen application shell
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clean full-screen page layout so that the artwork has an immersive canvas.
acceptanceCriteria: No page scrollbars on normal desktop resolution

userStories.title: Bootstrap three.js renderer
userStories.description: As a user, I want a basic rendered 3D scene so that the graphics pipeline is confirmed working.
acceptanceCriteria: No uncaught runtime errors on load

userStories.title: Define domain models for metrics and visuals
userStories.description: As a developer, I want typed models for network data and scene parameters so that modules exchange data clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Interfaces exist for ProbeSample, NetworkSnapshot, SceneParams
userStories.notes: Required for metric aggregation and mapping.

userStories.title: Add deterministic fast, mixed, and poor presets
userStories.description: As a developer, I want simulated connection presets so that visuals can be developed without relying on live network state.
userStories.notes: Useful early for parallel visual development.

userStories.title: Implement same-origin latency probe sampler
userStories.description: As the system, I want repeated same-origin probes so that RTT and jitter can be estimated safely in-browser.

userStories.title: Collect resource timing metrics
userStories.description: As the system, I want browser resource timing data so that load behavior can influence visuals.

userStories.title: Aggregate metrics into one normalized snapshot
userStories.description: As the system, I want one merged network state object so that rendering code uses a single input.
acceptanceCriteria: Missing sources do not crash output

userStories.title: Map snapshot to cathedral scene parameters
userStories.description: As the system, I want network conditions translated into art-direction values so that visuals react consistently.

userStories.title: Generate base cathedral geometry
userStories.description: As a user, I want a recognizable cathedral form so that the concept is visually legible.

userStories.title: Add ruin modifiers for degraded connections
userStories.description: As a user, I want poor connections to create fractured brutalist ruins.
acceptanceCriteria: Debris density increases on poor state

userStories.title: Add atmosphere, fog, and lighting moods
userStories.description: As a user, I want mood changes between elegant and ruined states.
acceptanceCriteria: Fast state is brighter and cleaner
Poor state is darker or denser
Palette changes do not recreate renderer

userStories.title: Add debug HUD
userStories.description: As a developer, I want visible metrics and scene values so that tuning is easier.

userStories.title: Add reduced motion and hidden-tab throttling
userStories.description: As a user, I want respectful motion settings and reduced background work.

userStories.title: Add PNG export and shareable preset URLs
userStories.description: As a user, I want to save or share interesting cathedrals.

userStories.title: Add browser smoke tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want end-to-end tests so that core flows are validated in a real browser.
